title: rFactor

notes:
By setting shader on auto and maximum resolution (1080p) the game runs but extremely slow, does not properly display menu entries - probably because of it. 

More importantly, the readout for system memory and GPU is not correct - too little RAM, too little VRAM. The game apparently under-utilizes system resources and therefore runs extremely slow.
